name: block-destructive
description: Denies destructive bash patterns: rm -rf /, force-push to protected branches, dd to /dev/sd*, chmod -R 777, etc.

name: scan-secrets
description: Denies writes whose new content matches API-key, token, private-key, or credential regexes.

name: scan-injection
description: Denies tool inputs containing prompt-injection markers (system prompt overrides, role escapes, instruction-replacement strings).

name: require-read-before-edit
description: Denies Edit/Write on files not Read in the current session. Prevents the 33.7% blind-edit failure mode (issue #42796).

name: scope-guard
description: When a scope file declares an allow-list of paths, denies edits outside the list. No scope file = no gate.

name: exploration-depth-gate
description: Denies edits before sufficient exploration (Read/Grep/Glob count below FORGE_EXPLORE_DEPTH, default 6).

name: behavioral-anchor
bypass: remove or archive a rules.d/*.txt entry
description: Injects priority-ordered behavioral rules from rules.d/ as a system-prompt anchor on every user turn.

name: output-style-check
description: Surfaces a session-start anchor when the active output style would conflict with safety-critical formatting.

name: self-review-nudge
description: After every N (default 3) Write/Edit calls, nudges the model to review its recent changes before continuing.

name: audit-sensitive-ops
description: Async append to the policy ledger when a Write/Edit touches sensitive paths (.env, credentials, ~/.ssh, etc.).

name: track-exploration
description: Increments the per-session exploration counter consumed by FS11 (exploration-depth-gate).

name: track-file-reads
description: Records each file path Read into the per-session read-set consumed by FS04 (require-read-before-edit).

name: proof-of-done-gate
description: Blocks Stop when the last assistant message claims completion (done/fixed/passing/working/...) without supporting evidence (tool_use, file:line, fenced shell block, or /verify invocation) in the recent assistant turns.

name: preflight-impact
description: Project-agnostic. When Claude is about to touch a broad-blast file (CI config, container/orchestration manifest, build file, dependency manifest, lockfile, top-level tooling config, schema/migration, repo-wide doc, .env), injects an additionalContext reminder describing the role and pointing at code-review-graph MCP get_impact_radius_tool for callers/dependents.

name: changelog-leak
description: Warns when written content includes Sprint/Phase/changelog markers that CLAUDE.md forbids in source. Skips .claude/plans/, .claude/lineage/, CHANGELOG files.

name: clean-tree-gate
description: Blocks Stop when staged or unstaged changes contain Sprint/Phase markers. Backstop for FS52 since PostToolUse cannot undo writes.

name: docs-touched-gate
bypass: FORGE_DOCS_TOUCHED_GATE=0 / stop_hook_active / non-git tree / no doc surfaces
description: Project-agnostic. Warns when at least FORGE_DOCS_TOUCHED_THRESHOLD (default 3) substantive code files changed without any canonical doc surface (README / CHANGELOG / docs/ / ADR / CLAUDE.md) being touched in the same session.

name: precompact-snapshot
description: Snapshots last 10 user corrections (no/stop/don't/actually/wait/...) to ~/.claude/projects/<slug>/memory/.precompact-feedback.txt so behavioral feedback survives compaction; long-session surface-progress.sh tails it on next SessionStart.
